rows.label: qev031207_MSG0002
rows.name:
You came to tear us apart, didn't you?
Just because she's a Bias and I'm an
Earthling... For such a ridiculous reason...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031207_SEL0021
rows.name: Try to persuade Leroy with a soft demeanor.

rows.label: qev031207_MSG0003
rows.name:
If it were the me from before, I might
have been terrified by words like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031207_MSG0004
rows.name:
But... I've said goodbye to
that weak version of myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031207_MSG0005
rows.name:
I won't be shaken by whatever
words you throw at me anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031207_MSG0006
rows.name:
And from now on... I'll become
stronger than people from any planet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031207_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hey, we should run! That person...
They're probably ridiculously strong![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031207_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'm a BLADE, too, after all. I can
at least tell that much. But Lavina,
I'm not running away anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031207_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'll protect you from everything in this
world! Whether it's Bias or Earthlings...
From now on... I'll stand against it all![ST:wait ]
